title: Lines of Code Should Not Be Excessively Long
description: Long lines of code can significantly reduce code readability as it may require horizontal scrolling to see the entire line. This rule checks for lines of code that exceed a certain length.
recommendation: Consider breaking down long lines of code into multiple shorter lines to improve readability. Use appropriate indentation and formatting practices.
impact: Improving the length of lines enhances the readability of the code, which can lead to fewer bugs and easier maintenance.

checks.message: Consider breaking down long lines of code into multiple shorter lines to improve readability. Use appropriate indentation and formatting practices.
